mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.USER_PRFIL_ID , A.USERNM , A.ORG_ID -- , A.MOBILE_NO -- , A.EMAIL , A.DEPT_CD -- , A.DEPTNM -- , A.DISABLILITY_YN -- , A.SCHREG_GBN -- , A.OFCE_TELNO , (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_PRFIL_ID) AS USER_ID -- , (SELECT MAX(SCYR) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S') AS SCYR , (SELECT LISTAGG(AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY USER_AUTHRT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.UP_CD = 'USR_TYCD' AND BB.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = A.USER_PRFIL_ID ) AS USER_AUTHRT_ID , (SELECT LISTAGG(BB.CDNM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CDNM) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.UP_CD = 'USR_TYCD' AND BB.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = A.USER_PRFIL_ID ) AS AUTHRT_GRPNM , (SELECT LISTAGG(BB.CDNM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CDNM) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.UP_CD = 'USR_TYCD' AND BB.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND BB.CD = 'ADMIN' WHERE AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = A.USER_PRFIL_ID ) AS ADMIN_AUTH_GRP_NM , (SELECT LISTAGG(BB.CDNM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CDNM) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.UP_CD = 'USR_TYCD' AND BB.ORG_ID = #{orgId} WHERE AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = A.USER_PRFIL_ID AND NVL(BB.CD, '') != 'ADMIN' ) AS WWW_AUTH_GRP_NM , (SELECT LISTAGG(AA.MENU_TYCD, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY MENU_TYCD) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA WHERE AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = A.USER_PRFIL_ID ) AS MENU_TYCD , MSTYN FROM (
) A
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.totalCount 설 명 : 사용자의 페이징 카운터 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) Z

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.select 설 명 : 사용자의 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.* , (SELECT ORGNM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID) AS ORGNM , ( SELECT MAX(AUTHRT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS ADMIN_AUTH_GRP_CD , ( SELECT MAX(USER_AUTHRT_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS WWW_AUTH_GRP_CD , SUBSTR(A.USERNM, -2) AS USER_NAME FROM TB_LMS_USER A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}
AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId}

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.listExcelUploadAuthGrp 설 명 : 사용자 엑셀업로드 할떄 등록가능한 권한 목록 */ SELECT USER_AUTHRT_ID , AUTHRT_GRPNM , MENU_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND MENU_TYCD IN ('STUDENT', 'PROFESSOR', 'ADMIN') AND ORG_ID = #{orgId} ORDER BY MENU_TYCD, AUTHRT_GRP_SEQ

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.selectForCompare 설 명 : 사용자의 정보 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , B.USER_ID , A.USERNM , A.USER_ENNM , NVL(A.PRFIL_PHOTO_FILE_ID, 0) AS PRFIL_PHOTO_FILE_ID , A.DUP_INFO , A.MOBILE_NO , A.EMAIL , A.ORG_ID , A.DEPT_CD , A.DEPTNM , A.EMAIL_RECV , A.SMS_RECV , A.DISABLILITY_YN , A.USER_GRADE , B.USER_ENCPSWD , B.USER_ENCPSWD AS USER_PASS_CONFIRM , A.TC_ID , A.TKN_EML , NVL(A.TC_ROLE, 'Member') AS TC_ROLE FROM TB_LMS_USR A, TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B WHERE A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.listSearchByProfessor 설 명 : 사용자 목록 검색 ( 교직원 ) */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , A.DEPTNM , COUNT(1) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT /* 교직원구분, 임용일자, 재직구분, 직급, 직급그룹 필요 */ FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.USER_ID IN ( SELECT DISTINCT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_PROF WHERE PROF_TYCD <> 'MONITORING' ) AND A.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
AND ( LOWER(A.DEPTNM) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{searchValue}), '%') OR LOWER(A.USER_ID) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{searchValue}), '%') OR LOWER(A.USERNM) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{searchValue}), '%') )
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.updateWithdrawal 설 명 : 사용자 탈퇴 ZOOM 값 제거 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_USR SET TKN_EML = NULL , TC_PW = NULL , TC_ID = NULL , TC_ROLE = NULL WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.updateWithdrawalStd 설 명 : 학생 탈퇴 수정 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_USR SET SCHREG_GBN = '탈퇴' , SCHREG_GBN_CD = '90' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ORG_ID != 'ORG0000001' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE MENU_TYCD = 'STUDENT' AND USER_ID = #{userId} )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.selectByTcId 설 명 : 특정 tcId 사용자 정보 조회 */ SELECT USER_ID , USERNM , TC_ID , TKN_EML FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE TC_ID = #{tcId} LIMIT 1

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.listAvailableUser 설 명 : 사용가능한 사용자 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.USER_ID IN
#{item}

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.listStudentByUniCd 설 명 : 재학생 중 대학생 or 학부생 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , A.ORG_ID , A.MOBILE_NO , A.EMAIL , A.DEPT_CD , A.DEPTNM , A.DISABLILITY_YN , A.SCHREG_GBN FROM TB_LMS_USR A USE INDEX(tb_home_user_info_USER_NM_IDX) JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.UNIV_CD = #{uniCd} AND A.SCHREG_GBN_CD = '01' AND IFNULL(A.STD_GBN , '') != '30' -- 시간제 제외 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE MENU_TYCD = 'STUDENT' AND USER_ID = A.USER_ID )

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.selectUserRecvInfo 설 명 : 사용자 수신정보 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , A.EMAIL , A.MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.listUserRecvInfo 설 명 : 사용자 수신정보 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.USERNM , A.EMAIL , A.MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR A JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND B.USER_ACNT_STSCD = 'U' WHERE A.ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND A.USER_ID IN
#{item}
mapper.insert:
/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.insertTmpUser 설 명 : 임시 사용자(학생) 등록 */
BEGIN INSERT INTO TB_LMS_USR ( USER_ID , DEPT_CD , ORG_ID , DEPTNM , USERNM , USER_ENNM , MOBILE_NO , EMAIL , DISABLILITY_YN , EXAM_SPRT_APLY_TYCD) SELECT #{userId} , '10000' , #{orgId} , 'TMP' , 'tmpuser' , 'tmpuser' , '010-1234-1234' , 'tmpuser@hycu.ac.kr' , 'N' , 'N' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) ; INSERT INTO TB_LMS_USER_ACNT ( USER_ID , USER_ID , USER_ENCPSWD , ADMIN_LOGIN_ACPT_DIV_CD , LOGIN_CNT , USER_ACNT_STSCD , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM , OTP_USEYN , DUP_LGN_PRMYN) SELECT #{userId} , #{userId} , 'ACNT' , 0 , 0 , 'U' , 'system' , FN_DTTM() , 'system' , FN_DTTM() , 'N' , 'N' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) ; INSERT INTO TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT ( MENU_TYCD , USER_AUTHRT_ID , USER_ID , ATFL_MAXSZ , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM) SELECT 'STUDENT' , 'USR' , #{userId} , 1024 , 'system' , FN_DTTM() , 'system' , FN_DTTM() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE MENU_TYCD = 'STUDENT' AND USER_AUTHRT_ID = 'USR' AND USER_ID = #{userId}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_USER_ACNT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}) ; END;
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.countUserByMenuType 설 명 : 메뉴 구분별 사용자 목록 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM (
) A

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.listUserByMenuType 설 명 : 메뉴 구분별 사용자 목록 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.USER_ORDER, B.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , A.USER_ID , B.USERNM , B.DEPTNM , B.MOBILE_NO , B.EMAIL , B.SCHREG_GBN , (SELECT MAX(SCYR) FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S') AS SCYR , ( SELECT LISTAGG(BB.CD, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BB.CD) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_ORG_CODE BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.CTGRCD = 'USER_TYPE' WHERE AA.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND BB.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID ) AS USER_AUTHRT_ID , ( SELECT LISTAGG(BB.CDNM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BB.CD) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_ORG_CODE BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.CTGRCD = 'USER_TYPE' AND BB.CD_OPTN = 'ADMIN' WHERE AA.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND BB.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID ) AS ADMIN_AUTH_GRP_NM , ( SELECT LISTAGG(BB.CDNM, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY BB.CD) FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT AA JOIN TB_ORG_CODE BB ON AA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = BB.CD AND BB.CTGRCD = 'USER_TYPE' WHERE AA.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND BB.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND NVL(BB.CD_OPTN, '') != 'ADMIN' ) AS WWW_AUTH_GRP_NM FROM (
) A JOIN TB_LMS_USR B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.selectUserOrgRltn 설 명 : 기관사용자 한사대 사용자 연결 조회 */ SELECT A.USER_ID , A.ORG_ID , A.KNOU_USER_ID , B.USERNM AS KNOU_USER_NM FROM TB_HOME_USER_ORG_RLTN A, TB_LMS_USR B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.KNOU_USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.USER_ID = #{userId}

/* SQL ID : UsrUserInfoDAO.selectUserOrgRltnByKnouUser 설 명 : 기관사용자 한사대 사용자 연결 조회 (by 한사대계정) */ SELECT A.USER_ID , B.USERNM , A.KNOU_USER_ID , A.ORG_ID , C.ORGNM , (SELECT CONCAT('|', GROUP_CONCAT(GA.MENU_TYCD SEPARATOR '|')) MENU_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT GA, TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP GB, TB_LMS_USR GC WHERE GA.MENU_TYCD = GB.MENU_TYCD AND GA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = GB.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND GA.USER_ID = GC.USER_ID AND GB.ORG_ID = GC.ORG_ID AND GB.ORG_ID = A.ORG_ID AND GA.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) MENU_TYCD , (SELECT USER_AUTHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = A.USER_ID ORDER BY MENU_TYCD DESC LIMIT 1) AS WWW_AUTH_GRP_CD FROM TB_HOME_USER_ORG_RLTN A, TB_LMS_USR B, TB_LMS_ORG C WHERE 1=1 AND A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID AND A.KNOU_USER_ID = #{userId} UNION SELECT B.USER_ID , B.USERNM , B.USER_ID , B.ORG_ID , C.ORGNM , (SELECT CONCAT('|', GROUP_CONCAT(GA.MENU_TYCD SEPARATOR '|')) MENU_TYCD FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT GA, TB_LMS_AUTHRT_GRP GB, TB_LMS_USR GC WHERE GA.MENU_TYCD = GB.MENU_TYCD AND GA.USER_AUTHRT_ID = GB.USER_AUTHRT_ID AND GA.USER_ID = GC.USER_ID AND GB.ORG_ID = GC.ORG_ID AND GB.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND GA.USER_ID = B.USER_ID) MENU_TYCD , (SELECT USER_AUTHRT_ID FROM TB_LMS_USER_AUTHRT WHERE USER_ID = B.USER_ID ORDER BY MENU_TYCD DESC LIMIT 1) AS WWW_AUTH_GRP_CD FROM TB_LMS_USR B, TB_LMS_ORG C WHERE 1=1 AND B.ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID AND B.USER_ID = #{userId}
